top_signals.title: Trump's defense budget, depleted war machine, spark state battle for business and jobs
top_signals.summary: Trump's huge defense budget request and a race to replenish weapons stocks while building hypersonic missiles lead to war between U.S. states for jobs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: AeroVironment booms 28% as dronemaker capitalizes on defense spending surge
top_signals.summary: AeroVironment is benefiting from U.S. plans to modernize the U.S. military and secure space.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ten years after Brexit: can the UK deliver change?
top_signals.summary: FT journalists answered subscribers’ questions at a webinar on June 25 2026

top_signals.title: Trump ally seeks to emulate Putin to stay in power in Serbia
top_signals.summary: Aleksandar Vučić says he plans to step down as president and return as premier after snap elections this autumn

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

Thirsty work! Here are 6 great ways to invest in wine

There are plenty of ways to experience viticulture aside from just drinking it. Invest English wine producer Folc have opened to public investment on Republic Europe.
